verificationCommands: bun run packages/rielflow/src/bin.ts workflow run codex-source-security-check-loop --variables '{"workflowInput":{"targetPath":".","runNetworkAudits":"false","maxFindings":50,"constraints":["Do not stage, commit, or push unless the user explicitly asks.","Do not revert unrelated dirty worktree changes.","Keep fixes narrowly scoped to verified security findings.","Focus on PR #54 / feature/sqlite-message-store changes, especially SQLite JSON validation, migration behavior, attachment paths, runtime DB writes, and documentation/skill edits."]}}' --output json --verbose --no-auto-improve

adversarialReviewCorrections.finding: Caller-owned pending claims were not completed or abandoned when the action threw, causing same-key retries to wait for pending timeout.
adversarialReviewCorrections.resolution: Added failed idempotency state, failIdempotentMutation, stored error replay for same-key retries, polling support for failed rows, and failed same-key regression coverage for sendManagerMessage and replayCommunication.

residualRisks: Nested codex-source-security-check-loop rerun stalled in Step 4 adversarial verification and was terminated; deterministic scanner/triage steps in session riel-codex-source-security-check-loop-1780824492-fb9a81ee had reached zero triaged high/medium source findings before the stall.
Network audits remained disabled per workflow input runNetworkAudits=false.
The original workflow commit handoff used a stale active plan path after archival; TASK-005 adds the recurrence guard and focused regression coverage.

active/refactoring-event-path-resolution.designReference: refactoring-divide-and-conquer event path-resolution package ownership slice reviews

completed/sqlite-runtime-json-checks.codexAgentReference: codex-agent / gpt-5.5 execution provider only; SQLite JSON validation is rielflow-owned runtime DB behavior.

selfReviewCorrections.finding: workflow_messages nullable payload_json NULL case was not actually asserted because the test helper used nullish coalescing.
selfReviewCorrections.resolution: Changed helper to preserve explicit null and added an assertion that payload_json and artifact_refs_json persist as NULL.

adversarialReviewCorrections.finding: Legacy workflow_messages compat_artifact_dir rebuild used a multi-statement db.exec copy that could drop communication history after malformed JSON rejected the constrained insert.
adversarialReviewCorrections.resolution: Replaced the compat rebuild with an explicit transaction and prepared INSERT ... SELECT before DROP/RENAME, then added malformed legacy compat regression coverage.

residualRisks: Malformed historical runtime SQLite JSON rows fail rebuild migration explicitly by design.
Step 7 adversarial review accepted the migration fix before plan archival.

active/swift-native-migration.codexAgentReference: codex-agent preferred local root ../../codex-agent unavailable; use packages/rielflow-adapters/src/codex.ts and pinned package metadata until Swift reference is supplied. Official SDK parity references: packages/rielflow-adapters/src/dispatch.ts, shared.ts, openai-sdk.ts, anthropic-sdk.ts; official/cursor-sdk remains explicitly deferred unless separately scoped.

residualRisks: Default swift lookup still requires DEVELOPER_DIR and SDKROOT override because xcode-select points at a Nix Apple SDK path.
High-risk runtime migration requires adversarial implementation review before release cutover.
Preferred local codex-agent reference root ../../codex-agent is unavailable.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Plan preserved official SDK backend strings but did not explicitly plan or defer official SDK Swift adapter behavior.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Expanded TASK-004 and verification/completion criteria to require official/openai-sdk and official/anthropic-sdk dispatch, request construction, API-key handling, retry/error normalization, output normalization, and no-live-credential tests; official/cursor-sdk remains explicitly deferred unless separately scoped.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Addon-only registry nodes were materialized with fabricated nodeFile paths even when authored workflow nodes declared only addon metadata.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Updated WorkflowNodeRef.nodeFile to be optional, preserved addon-only runtime nodes without synthesized node JSON files, and added fixture assertions for step10-git-commit and step11-git-push.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Swift workflow validation accepted unsafe nodeFile and stepFile values without the TypeScript workflow-relative path guard.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Added workflow-relative path validation for nodeFile and stepFile, rejecting absolute paths and '.' / '..' segments before materialization, with RielflowCoreTests regression coverage.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: The public validateAuthoredWorkflowJSON API bypassed raw nodeFile/stepFile safety checks for typed workflows.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Routed validateAuthoredWorkflowJSON through shared typed workflow-relative path validation before materialization and added direct typed API regression tests.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Typed workflow validation allowed unsafe synthesized nodeFile paths because validateAuthoredWorkflowJSON did not enforce node id and nodeFile/addon invariants before materialization.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Added typed workflow semantic validation for workflowId, node ids, duplicate ids, required nodeFile/addon bindings, step references, and transition/fanout references before materialization, with direct typed API regression coverage.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: The real process runner waited for process termination before reading stdout/stderr and ignored AdapterExecutionContext.deadline, allowing verbose local agents to deadlock on full pipes or run without timeout cleanup.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Updated FoundationLocalAgentProcessRunner to drain stdout/stderr concurrently, pass AdapterExecutionContext.deadline through LocalAgentProcessRunning, terminate child processes on deadline, return AdapterExecutionError.timeout, and added AgentAdapterTests coverage for large output and deadline termination.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Deadline handling could still hang indefinitely because timeout completion waited for stdout/stderr EOF after process.terminate when a child retained pipe handles or the process ignored SIGTERM.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Made deadline expiry resume AdapterExecutionError.timeout independently of pipe EOF, close pipe handles during timeout cleanup, terminate the direct process, schedule SIGKILL escalation, and added AgentAdapterTests coverage for a TERM-resistant pipe-holding command.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Timeout cleanup signaled only the direct Process PID, allowing shell-wrapper descendants with inherited workspace access or stdout/stderr handles to survive after AdapterExecutionError.timeout.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Changed FoundationLocalAgentProcessRunner to launch with posix_spawn and POSIX_SPAWN_SETPGROUP, signal the process group on deadline with direct-PID fallback, schedule SIGKILL escalation, and added AgentAdapterTests coverage that verifies a spawned child process is terminated after timeout.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Swift migration progress reused phase 193 and changed the shared phase status from COMPLETED to IN_PROGRESS, conflicting with completed/manager-control-idempotency-atomic-claim.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Restored phase 193 to COMPLETED for completed/manager-control-idempotency-atomic-claim, assigned active/swift-native-migration to distinct phase 195, and added phase 195 with IN_PROGRESS status.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Local agent stdout was parsed as JSON whenever it contained braces even when input.node.output was absent, so free-form agent text could fail the step or become an unintended structured payload.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Changed LocalAgentCommandAdapter to parse provider stdout as an envelope only when the node declares an output contract; no-contract stdout now always becomes a text business payload. Added AgentAdapterTests coverage for JSON-looking and fenced no-contract text plus contracted envelope parsing.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Provider failure errors included raw stderr without credential redaction, allowing local CLI failures to publish API keys, tokens, or secret-like values.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Added stderr redaction before AdapterExecutionError.providerError construction for secret-like assignments, sk-* tokens, bearer/token values, and sensitive environment values. Added AgentAdapterTests coverage for failing provider stderr with OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CURSOR_API_KEY, and bearer token material.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Nodes with an output contract could still succeed with plain text stdout because normalizeAgentOutput fell back to normalizeTextBusinessPayload when no JSON-looking text was present.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Removed the contracted-output text fallback so output-contracted local agents always parse stdout through parseJSONObjectCandidate and normalizeOutputContractEnvelope, returning invalidOutput for plain text. Added AgentAdapterTests coverage for output-contract plain text failure.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: spawnProcess did not explicitly close child-unused pipe descriptors, allowing stdin-consuming CLI agents to inherit a write end and potentially hang waiting for EOF.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Passed all pipe descriptors into spawnProcess and added child-side posix_spawn close actions for stdin writer, stdout reader, and stderr reader. Added AgentAdapterTests coverage using /bin/cat to verify stdin EOF is observed before the deadline.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Codex Swift target invoked codex exec --json but the shared local-process adapter parsed the whole stdout as one business JSON candidate, allowing Codex CLI JSONL/session event metadata to be accepted instead of the final assistant result.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Added codex-agent stdout normalization before shared output-contract parsing: JSONL events are parsed, final assistant content is selected from assistant.snapshot or response_item/message payloads, and non-final metadata no longer becomes the payload. Added AgentAdapterTests coverage for contracted and text payload Codex JSONL streams.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: TASK-004 and the backend adapter module remained Not Started even though current implementation changed LocalAgentProcess and AgentAdapterTests for local-agent/Codex JSONL hardening.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Marked prompt/output-contract and backend-faithful agent adapter modules IN_PROGRESS, set TASK-003 and TASK-004 to In Progress in the plan and PROGRESS.json, checked off completed local CLI hardening and codex-agent JSONL criteria under TASK-004, and added latest progress log with TASK-002, TASK-003, and TASK-004 in progress.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Timeout SIGKILL escalation could signal a stale process id after the original child exited, risking termination of an unrelated reused pid or process group.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: LocalProcessHandle now tracks exited state, cancels scheduled kill work in markExited after waitpid reaps the child, no-ops signal attempts after process reap, and AgentAdapterTests adds deterministic coverage for canceling delayed SIGKILL after process reap.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: LocalProcessHandle.markExited canceled delayed SIGKILL whenever the direct child was reaped, leaving TERM-resistant descendants alive after timeout.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Split direct pid and process-group tracking. markExited(afterTimeout: true) clears only the direct pid and preserves processGroupId for scheduled SIGKILL; normal reaps still cancel delayed kill. Added handle-level SIGKILL preservation coverage and a Foundation runner test with a TERM-resistant child descendant.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: markExited(afterTimeout: true) preserved delayed SIGKILL without proving the process group still contained descendants, reopening stale process-group signaling risk when the group was already empty.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: markExited(afterTimeout: true) now probes kill(-processGroupId, 0) through processGroupIsLive before preserving scheduled SIGKILL. Empty process groups clear processGroupId and cancel delayed kill; live groups retain escalation. AgentAdapterTests covers both live and gone timeout-reap cases plus the TERM-resistant descendant runner path.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: Delayed SIGKILL signaled the stored process group after an earlier liveness probe; descendants could exit before the delayed kill fired and make the process-group id stale.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: killScheduledProcessGroup now re-checks processGroupIsLive immediately before SIGKILL and clears stale scheduled process groups without signaling. AgentAdapterTests covers the race where markExited sees a live group but the delayed-kill probe sees it gone.

addressedReviewFindings.finding: High-risk Swift process-control changes and delayed-SIGKILL race fix lacked Swift test evidence because default swift lookup failed.
addressedReviewFindings.resolution: Located Xcode Swift at /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/swift, ran Swift 6.3.2 with DEVELOPER_DIR and SDKROOT pointed at Xcode, and swift test passed 28 tests.
